name: Coconut Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the rice for 30 minutes in 1 1/2 cups of water.
2. At the same time, soak the coconut for 30 minutes in 2 cups of water.
3. Drain the rice and set aside. Reserve the water.
4. Blend the coconut using the water in which it was soaked. Strain and reserve the coconut milk.
5. Heat butter or oleo in a skillet. Add onions and sauté until golden.
6. Add rice and fry for a few minutes.
7. Add coconut milk and reserved water from the rice soaking process. Bring to a boil.
8. Add salt to taste and cardamom. Lower heat and cook until rice is done.
